final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for the brand RAN QIU, emphasizing autumn warmth and Eastern poetic aesthetics.

Style/medium: Eastern aesthetic photography with minimalist composition, warm and healing visual language, golden hour editorial
Composition: centered layout with generous negative space, shallow depth of field, medium shot perspective
Subject: RAN QIU brand identity integrated with natural autumn elements, organic textures, subtle elegance
Scene/backdrop: warm autumn atmosphere with natural elements, soft outdoor or studio setting suggesting harvest season
Lighting/mood: golden hour natural light, soft and diffused, warm and tranquil mood
Color palette: deep autumn brown-red (#8B3A1E) as anchor, warm beige (#E8DCCB) as base, golden brown (#D4A574) as accent, harmonious warm earth tones
Materials/textures: natural organic surfaces, soft fabric textures, dried botanical elements, matte paper finish
Text (verbatim): "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must maintain clean minimalist aesthetic; brand colors must be dominant; ample white space required
Avoid: oversaturated colors, cluttered composition, cold tones, harsh shadows, generic stock photo aesthetic, neon colors
